facebook.caption: Locals don't post about this bar. It's inside a house built in 1982. No neon signs outside. No tourist foot traffic. Just walk through the door at 149 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and find Origin 1982, a speakeasy that pulls a 4.9-star rating from 607 people who clearly kept it to themselves. Order something, sit down, forget the resort strip exists. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Push open the door of a house built in 1982. What's inside is not what you expect. Origin 1982 is Phu Quoc's best-kept cocktail secret. 4.9 stars. 607 reviews. Zero tourist crowds.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about this one. Origin 1982. Speakeasy inside a real 1982 house. 4.9 stars. 607 reviews. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Walk into a 1982 house. Find a 4.9-star speakeasy. Origin 1982 on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is Phu Quoc's quietest flex.

tiktok.caption: A 1982 house. A secret bar. 4.9 stars. Nobody talks about Origin 1982 in Phu Quoc and that's the point. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocNightlife #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
